mapper.select: SELECT place_id AS placeId, title, addr1, addr2, mapx, mapy, first_image AS firstImage, like_count AS likeCount, place_type AS placeType FROM place ORDER BY CAST(place_id AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXT VALUE FOR seq_place
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, title, addr1, addr2, mapx, mapy, first_image, like_count, place_type, lclssystm1, lclssystm2, lclssystm3, is_active ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{title}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{mapx}, #{mapy}, #{firstImage}, 0, #{placeType}, #{lclssystm1}, #{lclssystm2}, #{lclssystm3}, 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT place_id AS placeId, title, addr1, addr2, mapx, mapy, first_image AS firstImage, like_count AS likeCount, place_type AS placeType, lclssystm1, lclssystm2, lclssystm3, is_active AS isActive FROM place
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR addr1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY CAST(place_id AS UNSIGNED) DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET title = #{title}, place_type = #{placeType}, lclssystm1 = #{lclssystm1}, lclssystm2 = #{lclssystm2}, lclssystm3 = #{lclssystm3}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2} WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.post_id AS postId, p.title AS postTitle, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.reported_at AS createdAt FROM report_schedule_post r JOIN schedule_post p ON r.post_id = p.post_id ORDER BY r.reported_at DESC
SELECT report_id AS reportId, post_id AS postId, reporter_id AS reporterId, reason AS reason, status AS status, reported_at AS createdAt FROM report_schedule_post WHERE report_id = #{reportId}

SELECT post_id AS postId, title, user_id AS userId, posted_at AS postedAt, CASE WHEN is_hidden = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isActive FROM schedule_post
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY posted_at DESC
